title: Verilator finds a latch where there is no one

features.name: parameter-based bit indexing in conditional expression
features.description: Code should include a conditional expression that indexes a signal using a parameter as the bit position, e.g., A[param-1] ? -A : A

features.name: unary minus on vector operand
features.description: Code should include a unary minus operator applied to a multi-bit vector operand within a conditional expression

features.name: combinational always with edge-style sensitivity list and if-else
features.description: Code should include a combinational always block using edge-style (@(...) or) sensitivity list with an if-else that assigns signals in only one branch

features.name: signal assigned only in else branch of combinational always
features.description: Code should include a signal that is assigned only within an else branch of a combinational always block, where the signal is used only within that same branch
